summary: SentCom Unified Header and Glassy Mockup Styling - All 16 Features Verified Successfully. The Trading Bot Panel Header has been incorporated into SentCom Panel Header with full glassy mockup styling applied. All UI elements visible and functional.

minor.issue: Returns 503 (IB Gateway offline - expected in preview environment)

sentcom_branding.details: SENTCOM branding visible with Brain icon logo

connection_status.details: CONNECTED/OFFLINE status indicator visible (shows OFFLINE as expected when IB Gateway not connected)

mode_indicator.details: Mode indicator visible - AUTONOMOUS (cyan) and CONFIRMATION modes tested

ib_connection_status.details: IB OFFLINE indicator visible (expected in preview)

order_pipeline.details: Order Pipeline visible with Pending (0), Executing (0), Filled (0) counts

settings_button.details: Settings button (gear icon) clickable and opens Trading Mode selector panel

trading_mode_selector.details: 3 Trading Mode options visible: Autonomous, Confirmation, Paused - all with correct styling and data-testid attributes

start_stop_button.details: Stop button visible with red styling; toggles to Start button when bot stopped

our_positions_panel.details: 'Our Positions' panel visible with glassy styling (bg-gradient, backdrop-blur-xl, border-white/10)

setups_watching_panel.details: 'Setups We're Watching' panel visible with glassy styling

live_team_stream.details: 'Live Team Stream' visible with SENTCOM messages displaying confidence levels

quick_actions.details: All 6 Quick Action buttons visible and clickable: Performance, News, Brief, Rules, Summary, Check Trade

chat_input.details: Chat input visible, accepts text input ('Talk to the team... Ask questions, give commands, or discuss strategy')

send_button.details: Send button (cyan arrow icon) visible and functional

dashboard_header.details: Command Center branding visible with AI Credits (281), Account ($0), Buying Power, Today P&L, Open P&L, and Time

glassy_styling.details: 24 elements found with glass-morphism styling (backdrop-blur, from-white/, border-white/)

test_data_observed.mode: Changed from AUTONOMOUS to CONFIRMATION during test

critical_code_review_comments: SentCom.jsx: Unified header properly implements useTradingBotControl() and useIBConnectionStatus() hooks
SentCom.jsx: Trading Mode selector panel correctly toggles with AnimatePresence animation
SentCom.jsx: All data-testid attributes properly assigned (sentcom-embedded, sentcom-settings-btn, sentcom-toggle-bot, sentcom-mode-autonomous/confirmation/paused)
SentCom.jsx: Glass-morphism styling consistently applied (bg-gradient-to-br from-white/[0.08] to-white/[0.02], backdrop-blur-xl, border border-white/10)
NewDashboard.jsx: DashboardHeader correctly displays 'Command Center' branding with AI Credits, Account info, P&L, and Time

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real backend implementations. IB Gateway offline is expected in preview.

context_for_next_testing_agent: SentCom unified header fully implemented with Trading Bot controls (Start/Stop, Mode Selector). Glass-morphism styling applied throughout. All Quick Actions (Performance, News, Brief, Rules, Summary, Check Trade) visible and functional. Chat input working. IB Gateway shows OFFLINE in preview environment (expected behavior).
